retry_reason: The put operation (crypto_free_sync_skcipher) is unconditional and should never fail; retrying is meaningless as the object is already freed.
contract_summary: This put-wrapper releases the reference on the fallback sync_skcipher and zeroes the context structure. It is called when the cipher transformation is being destroyed. After this function returns, the caller must not use the fallback pointer or the context any further. The operation is unconditional and always succeeds; no error return or retry is needed.
